content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Hard Carry
description: Hard Carry is an Eridian-made Effervescent relic introduced in the Fight for Sanctuary DLC for Borderlands 2.

special.description: When paired with the Easy Mode shield, this relic massively boosts maximum health and greatly extends Fight For Your Life duration, but only while on Digistruct Peak. Tagline: Tough to lose when you are this broken.
special.title: Tough to lose when you're this broken.

abilities: Increases Fight For Your Life Time and Max Health while in the Raid on Digistruct Peak with the Easy Mode
